title: Multitude.
content:
We trust not to the multitude in war,
    But to the stout, and those that skilful are.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Multitude.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
